article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, factual language and attributes characterizations to the White House, avoiding adoption of any loaded framing. It reflects the article’s tone and perspectives proportionally.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (returned, identified, decided) and avoids charged wording.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: One minor extrapolation about a ‘direct flight’ is not sourced in the article; otherwise facts are attributed.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: All evaluative framing is attributed to official statements; none stated as the model’s own view.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarming or emotive language; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or internal states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Only perspective present is the White House statement, which matches the source; AP context included.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: No perspectives omitted given the article’s content.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives like ‘minor’ are sourced from the White House statement, not the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced description consistent with the source’s neutral report.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: References official White House information and AP reporting proportionally, as in the source.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly neutral and does not inherit any loaded framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists the White House statement and AP reporting/photography, matching the article’s sources.
